title: mentha × villosa f. nouletiana
intro: Mentha × villosa f. nouletiana, also known as Noulet's woolly mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid digestion and relieve nausea, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa f. nouletiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Noulet's woolly mint include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
